sql_fixture.redacted_sql: INSERT INTO research_tasks (id, tenant_id, project_id, created_by_actor_id, title, status) VALUES (:existing_research_task_id, :target_tenant_id, :target_project_id, :target_actor_id, :title, :status)

assertions.name: research_task_id_is_global_identity_boundary
assertions.expected: The primary key or tenant/id uniqueness invariant rejects reusing an existing research_task id across tenant boundaries.

assertions.name: project_fk_must_match_tenant
assertions.expected: The research_tasks project composite FK requires project_id to belong to the same tenant_id as the inserted task.

assertions.name: insert_failure_is_security_relevant
assertions.expected: The expected failure is treated as tenant isolation enforcement, not as a retryable duplicate insert.

metadata.notes: Sprint 10 BL-0029c full integration。Research/Evidence schema 系の cross-tenant negative skeleton fixture。No production row IDs or personal data.
